Features

Besides, it can also be cleaned by Anycubic Wash and Cure Machine or ultrasonic cleaning.

  • 【Low Viscosity & High Print Success Rates】The enhanced platform adhesion provides stable, high quality prints with high print success rates.
  • 【High Compatibility】 Anycubic Water Washable Resin 2.0 is compatible with a wide range of LCD and DLP 3D printers operating within the 365-405nm wavelength, our resin offers seamless integration with most printers on the market.

column3:
ELEGOO Water-Washable Resin V2.0

Experience cleaner and more convenient 3D printing with ELEGOO Water-Washable Resin V2.0. Designed for LCD and DLP resin 3D printers operating at 405 nm, this upgraded resin delivers exceptional print quality while simplifying post-processing with water instead of alcohol.


Key Features of ELEGOO Water-Washable Resin V2.0

1. Water-Washable Formula No more chemical hassles. This resin can be easily rinsed with ordinary tap water, making post-processing safer and more convenient. Ideal for homes, schools, and office setups.

2. High Print Precision The low viscosity and refined chemical composition of ELEGOO Water-Washable Resin V2.0 enable the printing of extremely fine details. Your miniatures, engineering models, and design prototypes come out with sharp features and minimal distortion.

3. Fast UV Curing Designed for use with 405nm UV light, the resin cures quickly and efficiently, improving production time without sacrificing quality. A great option for batch printing and time-sensitive projects.

4. Low Odor and Safer for Indoor Use Unlike conventional resins that emit strong chemical smells, ELEGOO’s upgraded formula ensures a more pleasant printing experience, even in enclosed workspaces.

5. Broad Compatibility ELEGOO Water-Washable Resin V2.0 is compatible with a wide range of 3D printers, including: ELEGOO Mars, Saturn, Jupiter Series, Anycubic Photon Mono, M3, M5 Series, Phrozen Series, Creality Series and Other LCD, MSLA, and DLP printers using 405nm UV wavelength

column3:
The Bambu Lab A2L Combo 3D Printer is a powerful large-format 3D printer designed for makers, professionals, educators, and businesses seeking exceptional print quality with minimal setup. Featuring an expansive 330 x 320 x 325 mm build volume, the A2L provides over 105% more printing space than standard 256 mm printers, allowing users to create larger models, functional prototypes, cosplay props, and batch productions in a single print. Its Full-Auto Calibration system automatically handles bed leveling, flow calibration, and vibration compensation, ensuring reliable and consistent results right out of the box.

Built for advanced multi-color and multi-material printing, the A2L seamlessly integrates with Bambu Lab AMS systems, supporting up to 19-color printing, filament drying, and enclosed filament storage. Equipped with intelligent print monitoring, adaptive vibration compensation, ultra-quiet operation, and optional modular add-ons for blade cutting and pen plotting, the Bambu Lab A2L delivers a versatile, high-performance 3D printing experience for both creative and professional applications.

Key Features

  • EXPANDED LARGE-FORMAT BUILD VOLUME – Massive 330 x 320 x 325 mm build area provides 105% more printing space than standard 256 mm printers, allowing larger models and batch production in a single print.
  • FULL-AUTOMATIC CALIBRATION SYSTEM – Automatically performs bed leveling, flow dynamics calibration, vibration compensation, and nozzle offset adjustment for effortless setup and consistent print quality.
  • MULTI-COLOR & MULTI-MATERIAL PRINTING – Compatible with Bambu Lab AMS Lite and 2nd Generation AMS systems, supporting advanced multi-color printing, filament drying, enclosed storage, and up to 19-color printing capabilities.
  • ADAPTIVE VIBRATION COMPENSATION TECHNOLOGY – Continuously analyzes printer dynamics throughout the print process to minimize ringing, ghosting, and layer artifacts for exceptional surface quality.
  • MODULAR FABRICATION PLATFORM – Supports optional blade cutting and pen plotting modules, transforming the printer into a versatile creative workstation beyond standard 3D printing.
  • INTELLIGENT PRINT FAILURE DETECTION – Advanced sensors monitor filament flow, tangles, runout, nozzle clogs, and extrusion issues, automatically pausing prints and notifying users through the Bambu Handy app.
  • UL CERTIFIED LOW-EMISSION PRINTING – UL 2904 GREENGUARD certified for indoor air quality when used with official Bambu Lab filaments, making it suitable for homes, classrooms, and offices.
  • ULTRA-QUIET OPERATION – Active motor noise cancellation, intelligent fan management, and precision motion components enable operation as low as 49 dB in Silent Mode.
  • SMART CONNECTIVITY & PRIVACY CONTROL – Choose between Bambu Cloud connectivity for remote monitoring and management or LAN-only mode for secure local-network operation.
  • MAKERWORLD ECOSYSTEM INTEGRATION – Access millions of ready-to-print models and streamlined workflows through the MakerWorld ecosystem, accelerating project creation from idea to finished print.

column3:
the Flashforge AD5X High-Speed Multi-Color 3D Printer is here to revolutionize your 3D printing experience. Whether you’re a hobbyist, business owner, designer, educator, or manufacturer, this powerful, compact, and vibrant full-color 3D printer brings efficiency and precision to your workflow.

Vibrant, True Multi-Color Printing

Equipped with an advanced Smart Multi-Color Printing Module (IFS), the Flashforge AD5X allows seamless 4-color filament switching. No more manual spools or setup delays—the system automatically switches filaments and even resumes prints with a 99% success rate after power outages. Say goodbye to color bleeding and hello to clean, crisp transitions.


Blazing Fast Speeds with Precision

With a maximum speed of 600mm/s and a max acceleration of 20000mm/s², the Flashforge AD5X delivers print jobs up to 41.5% faster than conventional printers. Thanks to the stable CoreXY structure and motion control, every model—from multi-colored dinosaurs to intricate prototypes—comes out sharper, smoother, and more consistent.

Supports Multiple Filaments

This 3D printer offers wide filament compatibility, including PLA, PLA Pro, Silk PLA, Matte PLA, PETG, PETG Pro, ASA, and supports open third-party brands. Whether you’re prototyping, designing, or printing production parts, the AD5X handles it effortlessly.

What’s in the Box:

  • Flashforge AD5X 3D Printer 
  • Power Cable
  • 4 Random Color Filaments (Optional Bundle)
  • Display Screen, Filament Holder, IFS Module
  • Tools Kit, Quick Start Guide

Key Features:

  • Natural wood-like appearance and texture

  • Environment-friendly PLA base material
  • Smooth surface finish with excellent layer adhesion

column2: ELEGOO Jupiter 2 3D Printer – AI Monitoring, Auto Leveling & Ultra Smooth Printing
column3:
The world of large-format resin 3D printing is entering a new era, and the launch of Elegoo Debuts Jupiter 2 Large-Format Resin 3D Printer for Bigger Ideas and Smarter Engineering at RAPID+TCT 2025 marks a significant step forward for both professionals and passionate creators
The Elegoo Debuts Jupiter 2 Large-Format Resin 3D Printer for Bigger Ideas and Smarter Engineering at RAPID+TCT 2025 introduces an entirely upgraded approach to high-volume resin printing. This model is more than an incremental improvement—it reflects a new design philosophy focused on accessibility, consistency, and smarter engineering. Built for users who require a large build area, precision detailing, and reliable long-term performance, the Jupiter 2 stands as Elegoo’s most advanced resin printer to date.

A New Benchmark in Large-Format Resin Printing

Unveiled at the prestigious Rapid + TCT 2025 event in Detroit, the Elegoo Debuts Jupiter 2 Large-Format Resin 3D Printer for Bigger Ideas and Smarter Engineering at RAPID+TCT 2025 instantly captured the attention of engineers, product designers, prop makers, and manufacturing professionals. With a massive 302.40 × 161.98 × 300 mm build volume, it is now the largest resin printer in the entire Elegoo lineup—ideal for large prototypes, medical models, engineering components, hobby builds, and intricate display pieces that demand size without compromising accuracy.

The system features an ultra-high-resolution 14-inch 16K monochrome LCD, delivering crisp details with an impressive 20 × 26 µm XY resolution. The result? Razor-sharp models with beautifully smooth surfaces, making the printer suitable for applications where precision is non-negotiable.

Elegoo has also introduced a fully enclosed light engine, designed to deliver evenly distributed curing, reducing model defects and enhancing layer uniformity. Whether you’re printing functional parts or artistic creations, the Jupiter 2 ensures premium output right out of the box.

Key Features

  • Ultra-High 16K Printing Precision: The 14-inch 16K LCD screen delivers ultra-high resolution and exceptional detail. As a result, users can produce highly detailed models with smooth surfaces, which makes the printer ideal for professional applications.
  • Massive Large-Format Build Volume: The large 302.4 × 161.98 × 300 mm build area allows users to print large models effortlessly. Additionally, users can print multiple parts simultaneously, which significantly increases production efficiency.
  • Auto-Leveling System: The multi-point automatic bed leveling system calibrates the build plate accurately before printing. Therefore, it ensures consistent print quality and reliable results. Moreover, users can also perform manual leveling for precise adjustments when needed.
  • Smart Resin Tank with Temperature Control: The intelligent resin tank preheats the resin and maintains an optimal temperature automatically. As a result, the printer delivers stable resin flow and consistent print quality even in varying environments.
  • Automatic Resin Feeding & Recycling: The smart resin management system automatically supplies resin during printing. Additionally, it recycles unused resin, which helps reduce material waste. Furthermore, the detachable resin box supports a 2KG resin bottle, making large print jobs more convenient.
  • Quick and Easy Maintenance: The modular design allows users to replace the LCD screen in just 10 minutes. Consequently, this reduces downtime and ensures faster maintenance.
  • Ultra-Fast Release Film Replacement: Users can replace the release film in only 10 seconds, which is up to 10× faster than traditional systems. Therefore, maintenance becomes quicker and more efficient.
  • Built-In Camera for Real-Time Monitoring: The integrated camera allows users to monitor prints remotely in real time. In addition, the adaptive lighting system ensures clear visibility even in low-light environments.
  • User-Friendly Design: The printer features a practical and user-friendly design for everyday operation. For instance, the double-door front allows easy access for removing prints, while the clear viewing window helps users monitor prints quickly. Moreover, rubberized corners provide additional protection, and the resin drip tray keeps the workspace clean.
  • Compatible with Mars Mate: The Elegoo Mars Mate Air Purifier works seamlessly with the Elegoo Jupiter 2 16K Resin 3D Printer. As a result, it helps reduce resin odors and creates a cleaner and more comfortable printing environment.

column2: Anycubic Kobra X Combo (7 Colors) Large-Format 3D Printer
column3:
The Anycubic Kobra X Combo (7 Colors) is a high-performance large-format FDM 3D printer designed for creators, engineers, educators, and businesses that require large build size, stable printing, material flexibility, and reliable automation. This combo edition is bundled with 7 filament colors, making it an ideal all-in-one solution for prototyping, education, design validation, and creative production.

Powered by intelligent features and robust mechanical design from Anycubic, the Anycubic Kobra X Combo (7 Colors) delivers professional-grade output while remaining accessible for beginners.


Built Bigger for Bigger Ideas

One of the biggest strengths of the Anycubic Kobra X Combo (7 Colors) is its massive 300 × 300 × 400 mm build volume. This allows users to print large models in one piece or produce multiple components simultaneously, significantly improving workflow efficiency.

Ideal applications include:

  • Functional and mechanical prototypes
  • Jigs, fixtures, and tooling
  • Architectural and engineering models
  • Educational demonstrations and lab projects
  • Cosplay props, helmets, and enclosures
  • Small-batch production and custom parts

With the Anycubic Kobra X Combo (7 Colors), you no longer need to compromise on model size or split designs into multiple sections.


 Auto Bed Leveling – Print with Confidence

Bed leveling is often the most frustrating part of 3D printing. The Anycubic Kobra X Combo (7 Colors) eliminates this issue using LeviQ intelligent auto bed leveling technology.

This system automatically measures the print bed at multiple points and compensates for uneven surfaces, ensuring:

  • Excellent first-layer adhesion
  • Reduced print failures
  • Faster setup and calibration
  • Stress-free operation for beginners

Thanks to LeviQ, the Anycubic Kobra X Combo (7 Colors) is one of the most beginner-friendly large-format 3D printers available.


Direct Drive Extruder for Accuracy & Flexibility

The direct drive extruder places the extrusion motor close to the nozzle, giving the Anycubic Kobra X Combo (7 Colors) precise filament control and smooth material flow. This setup is especially beneficial for:

  • Flexible filaments like TPU
  • Detailed models with frequent retractions
  • Functional mechanical parts
  • Long and continuous print jobs

Paired with an all-metal hotend, the printer supports higher temperatures and consistent extrusion even during extended production runs.


Stability, and Silent Operation

The Anycubic Kobra X Combo (7 Colors) offers an excellent balance between speed and precision, supporting print speeds of up to 100 mm/s without compromising surface quality.

Key structural advantages include:

  • Dual Z-axis system for tall, stable prints
  • Reinforced metal frame to reduce vibration and wobble
  • Silent motherboard and optimized stepper drivers

This makes the printer suitable for homes, offices, classrooms, labs, and professional workspaces.


Material Compatibility

The Anycubic Kobra X Combo (7 Colors) supports a wide range of commonly used filaments:

  • PLA – easy and beginner-friendly
  • ABS – strong and heat-resistant
  • PETG – durable and slightly flexible
  • TPU – elastic and impact-resistant

The included 7 filament colors enable multi-color prototyping, visual part identification, teaching demonstrations, and creative design work, right out of the box.


Trusted by Professionals.

The Anycubic Kobra X Combo (7 Colors) is designed for reliability and long prints, featuring:

  • Filament run-out detection
  • Power-loss recovery (resume printing)
  • Responsive touchscreen interface

These features protect long print jobs, reduce material waste, and make the printer dependable for business, institutional, and educational environments.

column2: Bambu Lab Harden Steel Nozzle For A1 Mini / H2D / A1
column3:
Product Description — Hardened Steel Nozzle for Bambu Lab A1/A1 Mini

The Hardened Steel Nozzle is a durable, wear-resistant replacement nozzle designed specifically for the Bambu Lab A1 and A1 Mini 3D printers. Unlike standard brass or stainless steel nozzles, this hardened steel version is built to withstand abrasion from tough and composite filaments, making it ideal for extended printing projects and challenging materials.

Key Features:

  • Premium Hardened Steel Construction: Built for longevity and exceptional resistance to wear and abrasion — perfect for abrasive materials like carbon fiber, glass-filled, wood-filled, and glow-in-the-dark filaments.

  • High Temperature Performance: With excellent thermal durability, it supports high nozzle temperatures (often up to ~500 °C with quality variants), ensuring consistent extrusion and stability during long prints.

  • Compatible with A1/A1 Mini: Designed to fit the hotend of Bambu Lab A1 and A1 Mini printers, ensuring a secure and reliable fit.

  • 1.75 mm Filament Support: Works with standard 1.75 mm filament formats used in these printers.

  • Easy Replacement: User-friendly installation lets you swap nozzles quickly to adapt to different filament types or replace worn tips.

  • Versatile Material Compatibility: Ideal for PLA, ABS, PETG, TPU, Nylon, PP, and other high-performance materials.

Why Choose Hardened Steel:
Standard brass or stainless steel nozzles wear out rapidly when printing abrasive composites. Hardened steel significantly prolongs nozzle life, reduces frequent replacements, and maintains high print quality over time — especially when using abrasive filament blends.

  2. Operates independently without reliance on cloud services, allowing for full functionality within local networks.
  3. Utilizes G3 pre-filter, H12 HEPA filter, and activated carbon filter to effectively filter particulates and VOCs.
  4. Regulates chamber temperature up to 60°C to reduce warping and improve layer bonding.

  6. Incorporates carbon-fiber rods for a rigid structure, enabling high-speed printing with minimal vibrations.
    Vibration and Extrusion Compensation: Automatically compensates for XY-axis vibrations and extrusion issues for smooth print quality.
  7. Detects print failures and pauses printing automatically to prevent wastage and downtime.
  8. Supports auto filament reload and multi-material printing for improved surface quality and seamless color transition

The X1E 3D printer represents a cutting-edge solution with enhanced connectivity options, including stable Ethernet and WPA2-Enterprise Wi-Fi authentication, ensuring robust network communication even in complex environments. Operating independently from cloud services, it offers heavy-duty air filtration, active heating, and controlled chamber temperature for optimal print quality. With advanced features like AI failure detection and intelligent filament management, the X1E promises seamless, high-quality 3D printing experiences.

 

Enhanced And More Connection Options

Stable Ethernet Connection, WPA2-Enterprise Authentication Wi-Fi Connection

The X1E offers the option to connect to your devices through its newly added Ethernet port, ensuring robust network communication in complex environments. Ethernet connectivity can also be used in crowded wireless signal environments. Additionally, the X1E provides WPA2-Enterprise Wi-Fi Authentication (EAP-PEAP/EAP-TLS/EAP-TTLS) and individual physical kill switches for both Wi-Fi and Ethernet, meeting stringent network security requirements.

Off-Cloud Operation

Fully Functional With LAN Only Mode

The X1E can operate independently without a connection to Bambu Cloud Service, fully functional within your local network. Customers can remotely control the X1E through LAN communication without requiring an Internet connection. For additional customization details, please contact your regional reseller.

Heavy Duty Air Filtration

Effectively Filter Particulates And VOCs Generated by 3D Printing

We combined a G3 pre-filter, an H12 HEPA filter, and a high-quality coconut shell activated carbon filter to provide optimal air filtration. Enhanced filtration can effectively reduce excessive odors and particulates when printing in less ventilated environments.

Active Heating And Controlled Chamber Temp

Reduce Warping, Improve Layer Bonding

The X1E can actively heat and regulate the chamber temperature. Accurately controlled chamber temperature (up to 60°C or 140°F) improves print quality, especially for filaments prone to warping such as ABS and PC.

320 °C (608 °F) Nozzle Temp

More Heat For Higher Temperature Materials

Higher nozzle temperature make possible to print higher performance materials such as PPA-CF/GF, PPS and PPS-CF. These new materials have better dimensional stability, heat resistance and mechanical performance.

Robust High Speed CoreXY

Super Fast And Rigid Structure For Continuous High Speed Printing

The superior carbon-fiber rods in the CoreXY motion structure enable the X1E to achieve a toolhead acceleration of 20,000 mm/s² by reducing the weight of moving parts. This faster acceleration allows the X1E to maintain its maximum travel speed of 500 mm/s for longer periods, significantly reducing overall print time.

Vibration And Extrusion Compensation

Stable & Quality Prints Even At Higher Speeds

X1E can actively compensate for XY-axis vibrations and extrusion issues to ensure exceptionally smooth print quality. All measurements are fully automatic, eliminating the need for manual adjustments.

AI Failure Detection

Reduce Filament Wastage And Machine Downtime

The X1E's AI algorithm can detect first-layer imperfections and spaghetti failures with the assistance of Lidar and computer vision. It then automatically pauses the print to prevent catastrophic failures.

Intelligent Filament Management

Supports Auto Filament Reload and Enables Multi-Material Printing with Support Material for Improved Surface Quality

X1E can parallel connect 4 Bambu AMS systems to print with up to 16 spools of filaments, good for printing dedicated support materials for seamless surface and printing multi-color. The AMS system also supports automatic filament reload to make sure you use all the filament on your spool before switching to a new one.

Product Features:

  • 340*320*340 mm³ Print Volume
  • Multi-color 3D Printing
  • Closed-loop Servo Motor Extruder

  • 5μm Resolution Optical Motion Calibration
  • 350°C Nozzle & 65°C Active Chamber Heating

Your Go-To Personal Manufacturing Hub

Correct Mechanical Deviations

Even the printer comes out of the factory with superb accuracy, mechanical wear and variances over time are inevitable—but now, first time in the industry, there’s a solution.With the Vision Encoder⁽¹⁾, the H2S achieves distance-independent motion accuracy under 50 μm—thinner than a human hair. During calibration, it automatically compensates for mechanical drift, ensuring consistent precision and peak performance over time.

One Print. Perfect Fit.

Bambu Lab’s Auto Hole/Contour Compensation⁽²⁾ minimizes printing tolerances, delivering machine-shop-level precision for hole dimensions. Design fit-critical parts with confidence—integrate shafts, bearings, and fasteners without trial and error. Post-print assembly has never been easier.

Ready for Engineering Filaments

Featuring a 350 °C hotend and a 65 °C actively heated chamber, it supports the entire Bambu filament lineup—from PLA and PETG to PC and PPA. With closed-loop fan control and precise thermal management, the H2S minimizes warping and deformation while improving layer adhesion. Build large, high-performance parts that are as functional as they are strong.

Even Surfaces, Crisp Edges

H2S uses both the sensing capability of its servo motor on the extruder and the high-resolution eddy current sensors on the nozzle to precisely control extrusion by measuring nozzle pressure and calibrating PA parameters for each filament, improving surface smoothness and edge sharpness. 

Precision in Motion

Active Vibration Compensation neutralizes micro-vibrations and resonance in real time, enabling premium print quality at higher speeds.

Print Functional Designs 

Intelligence That’s Got Your Back

20,000 Checks Per Second
Closed-Loop Feedback, Real-Time Control
Bambu Lab’s proprietary PMSM servo system enables 20 kHz resistance and position sampling to dynamically modulate electromagnetic torque vectors. It stabilizes extrusion and actively detects grinding⁽³⁾ or clogs in real time. 

23 Sensors + 3 Cameras

Each Potential Risk Has Its Own Detector

Pre-Flight Checklist by AI

Prior to each operational cycle, the H2S vision system initiates a comprehensive pre-flight checklist: Chamber Integrity Scan – Detects debris across the entire print surface. Hardware Configuration Audit – Instantly identifies build plate properties.

 

Flap Switch Airflow & Filtration System

3D Printing & Laser Cutting. 3 Modes, All-in-One  

High-Temp Printing

Chamber sealed. Internal air recirculates through the Air Filter and the heater to stabilize high-temp conditions. Print large engineering parts without warping.

Low-Temp Printing

Top Vent opens to bring in cool air, while maintaining a filtered exhaust⁽⁴⁾. Print PLA and PETG without opening the door, and handle overhangs and bridging with ease.

Laser Cutting/Engraving

Top Vent and Filter Switch Flap open. Fumes are channeled efficiently to the ventilation system, keeping your workspace safe and clean.

Bigger. Faster. Better.

Maximum Volume. Maximum Productivity.

With a build volume of 340×320×340 mm³, the H2S offers the largest print space among all Bambu Lab printers. Your Vision. Fully Realized in One Print.

Top Speed. More Reliable Than Ever.

Bambu Lab’s proprietary PMSM⁽⁵⁾ servo extrusion system delivers 67% more extrusion force, providing solid support to high flow⁽⁶⁾ printing. Paired with up to 1000 mm/s toolhead speed and up to 20,000 mm/s² acceleration, your H2S can finally go full throttle—cutting your printing time by up to 30%⁽⁷⁾—while maintaining top-tier quality.

Protected Inside and Out

Safety, Built In

Connectivity, By All Means Privacy, By Design

The H2S offers seamless cloud connectivity for convenient remote control from any device. For security-sensitive applications, it also delivers complete offline functionality, ensuring physically isolated operation. Users can control the printer, send files, and upgrade firmware—no internet required. Additionally, Developer Mode unlocks MQTT port access, empowering developers and integrators to connect third-party components and custom software with ease. 

Accessible. Comfortable. Made to Last.

 Quick-Swap Nozzle

Swap nozzles in seconds—no tools, no hassle. Whether you’re switching to a high flow hotend or a different nozzle size, the redesigned hotend makes it easy and intuitive, even for first-time users.


Quiet by Design
With Active Motor Noise Canceling and specialized air duct noise-reduction technology, the H2S operates below 50 dB⁽¹¹⁾. Print overnight or in shared spaces without disrupting your environment.

 

All-Metal, Die-Cast Body

The integrated die-cast aluminum alloy chassis delivers a sturdy, stable structure that provides a rigid foundation for high-speed, large-format printing, while minimizing accuracy loss caused by micro-twisting.
 

Multi-Color Printing

  • Built-in heating maintains optimal filament dryness during printing.

Smart Filament Management

High Precision Color Switching

Seamless Integration with Kobra S1

  • Compact, efficient design that fits easily into any workspace.

  • Multi-color figurines and artistic models

Bambu Lab AMS (Automatic Material System)

The Automatic Material System (AMS) is a smart multi-filament feeder designed to enhance 3D printing efficiency and creativity. It automatically manages up to four filament spools, allowing seamless multi-color or multi-material printing without manual swapping.

The AMS features a sealed, humidity-controlled enclosure that keeps filaments dry and protected from dust, ensuring consistent printing quality. Intelligent filament detection and automatic switching prevent run-out errors, while smooth feeding mechanisms reduce tangles and jams for reliable performance.

Its transparent cover and modular design provide clear visibility and easy access to each spool. Multiple AMS units can be connected to expand filament capacity, supporting up to 16 materials for complex printing projects.

Key Features

  • Holds up to 4 filament spools per AMS unit

  • Automatic material switching for multi-color or multi-material prints

  • Smart filament management with jam and run-out detection

  • Sealed storage system to protect filaments from moisture

  • Expandable system – connect up to 4 AMS units for 16 spools total

  • Compatible with multiple filament types: PLA, PETG, ABS, ASA, PC, and more

Compatibility

  • Bambu Lab X1 Series (X1, X1 Carbon)

  • Bambu Lab P1 Series (P1, P1S, P1P)

column3:
Overview

The Anycubic Kobra 3 V2 Combo is a high-speed, multi-colour capable FDM printer with a large build volume, designed for users wanting quicker prints, colour/multi-material options, and a lot of smart features. The “Combo” refers to the fact that it includes the ACE Pro module(s) that allow multi-colour/multi-filament printing (4-color, up to 8-color if two ACE Pros are used + the hub).

Product Description

A high-performance, feature-rich FDM 3D printer designed for speed, multi-colour capability, and versatile material use. Built for serious prototyping, creative design, and flexible, high throughput printing workflows.

Key Features & Technical Specifications

  • Build Volume: Approx. 255 × 255 × 260 mm — allows printing moderately large objects in one go without splitting parts.

  • Print Speed & Acceleration:

    • Maximum travel speeds up to ~600 mm/s

    • Acceleration up to ~20,000 mm/s²

    • Recommended operational speed lower (for best surface quality and reliability)

  • Nozzle & Hotend:

    • Standard nozzle diameter: 0.40 mm, with options for 0.60 mm or 0.80 mm to trade detail vs. speed

    • Maximum hotend temperature: ~300 °C, allowing use of more advanced engineering filaments

  • Build Plate:

    • Heated bed with maximum temperature up to ~110 °C

    • Flexible or spring-steel plate with PEI (or equivalent) surface for good adhesion and easy part release

  • Multi-colour / Multi-filament Capability:

    • Enables printing with multiple filaments / colours via one or more filament-feeding modules

    • Supports a setup with additional filament ports or hubs to manage several spools

  • Filament Handling & Drying:

    • Built-in filament drying chamber or system maintained at moderate elevated temperature (≈ 35-55 °C) to reduce moisture issues

    • Filament run-out detection and retraction or pause-on-run-out features

  • Auto-leveling & Frame Stability:

    • Automatic bed leveling system, reducing manual intervention

    • Reinforced frame / upgraded bearings on critical axes to minimize vibration/artifact at high speeds

    • Wider gantry or support in one or more axes to improve leveling consistency

  • Electrical & Power:

    • Single power input unit, combined printer + module draw possibly up to ~400 W under load

    • Compatible with typical mains supplies; ensure stable voltage and adequate ventilation

  • User Interface & Monitoring:

    • Touchscreen control panel (≈ 4-5 inch capacitive display) for job setup, adjustments, firmware updates

    • Integrated camera for print monitoring; potential for remote status viewing, time-lapse capture

  • Safety & Recovery Features:

    • Power-loss recovery (pauses print and resumes once power resumes)

    • Detection of filament issues (run-out, jam, entanglement)

    • Temperature protections for hotend / bed

  • Supported Filaments:

    • Standard materials: PLA, PETG, TPU (flexible filament)

    • With upgrade modules: ABS, ASA, PC, PA, PP, HIPS, etc. (depending on hotend grade, enclosure or ambient conditions)

  • Nozzle Options:

    • Standard fine nozzle (0.4 mm) for detail

    • Larger nozzles (0.6-0.8 mm) for faster printing and larger layer heights

  • Physical Characteristics:

    • Moderate footprint; heavy components if multi-filament module(s) attached

    • Packaging includes printer base, filament feeding module(s), spool hub(es), power supply, build plate, and accessories

Typical Operation Conditions & Trade-Offs

  • To maintain high print quality, speed, and accuracy, regular calibration is needed (bed leveling, checking belt tensions, etc.).

  • Fast printing tends to introduce artifacts like ringing or ghosting, especially on tall or detailed prints; slower speeds may be used when detail is important.

  • Multi-filament / colour printing increases complexity: oozing, colour bleed, nozzle purging, and filament transitions require tuning.

  • Environmental conditions (temperature, humidity, ventilation) play a significant role, particularly when printing materials sensitive to moisture or cooling quickly (ABS, ASA, Nylon, etc.).

column2: ELEGOO ABS Like Photopolymer 3D Printer Resin
column3:
ELEGOO ABS Like Photopolymer 3D Printer Resin

Elevate your 3D printing experience with ELEGOO ABS-Like Photopolymer 3D Printer Resin. Crafted with precision engineering, this resin is tailored to perfection, ensuring your 3D prints reach a new level of excellence. The ELEGOO ABS-Like Photopolymer 3D Printer Resin offers several key features and benefits for 3D printing enthusiasts and professionals:

  • Low Shrinkage and High Precision: This resin is designed to minimize volume shrinkage during the photocuring process, ensuring that your 3D printed models have high precision and a smooth finish.
  • Fast Curing and Great Stability: ELEGOO 405nm Rapid Resin reduces printing time with excellent fluidity. Its stability and proper hardness provide a worry-free printing experience, increasing the chances of successful prints.
  • Bright and Stunning Colors: The resin contains high-quality pigments and photo-initiators, resulting in 3D printed models with vibrant and captivating colors, akin to artwork.
  • Wide Applications: ELEGOO standard resin is compatible with most DLP/LCD 3D printers, with the best results achieved on LCD 3D printers. It can be used for various purposes, including industrial spare parts, building models, DIY projects, board game miniatures, tools, and general modeling applications.
  • Safe and Secure Packaging: The resin is securely packaged in a leak-proof bottle wrapped with a plastic bubble bag and an exquisite designed package box to prevent any spills or leakage.
  • Light Odor & Hassle-Free: ELEGOO prioritizes minimizing odor and health concerns. Through careful research and formulation adjustments, they have created a resin with lower odor and health impacts suitable for both beginners and experts.
  • Fast & Easy Curing: This resin rapidly cures when exposed to UV light in the 385-410nm wavelength range, saving time and improving printing efficiency while maintaining model strength and accuracy.
  • Less Brittleness & Higher Tenacity: The resin possesses mechanical properties similar to ABS plastic, including high impact resistance, strength, and tenacity. It results in 3D-printed objects that are less prone to fracture or deformation.
  • Good Fluidity & Low Viscosity: The resin has good fluidity, ensuring that it solidifies quickly to the desired shape. It flows back when the print platform rises, preventing issues like “empty curing” or “holes on the model surface.” This enhances the success rate of your prints and makes resin tank cleaning and model removal easier.
  • High Precision & Low Shrinkage: The resin features low volume and linear shrinkage, which leads to 3D prints with exceptionally smooth surface finishes, fine textures, and accurate dimensions, capturing even the smallest details with clarity.
  • High Compatibility & Wide Applications: ELEGOO photopolymer resin is compatible with most LCD 3D printers in the UV wavelength range of 385-410nm, and it is suitable for a wide range of applications due to its strength and versatility.

column3:
The Anycubic Kobra 3 Max is a next-generation FDM 3D printer engineered for large-scale, high-speed, and precision printing. Designed with a massive 420 × 420 × 500 mm build volume, this printer enables users to create ultra-large models in a single print, significantly reducing assembly requirements and material waste.

With a maximum print speed of 600mm/s, LeviQ 3.0 Auto-Leveling, and AI-powered print monitoring, the Anycubic Kobra 3 Max is an ideal choice for professionals, businesses, and enthusiasts who demand efficiency, reliability, and cutting-edge technology.

Key Features

1. Ultra-Large Print Volume for High-Scale Printing

Massive 420 × 420 × 500 mm³ build area, allowing for the creation of large, single-piece models.

The print space is equivalent to two carry-on suitcases, ideal for functional prototypes, cosplay, and industrial applications.

Reduced filament waste by minimizing the need for assembling smaller parts.

2. High-Speed Printing with Advanced Motion Control

Maximum Print Speed: 600mm/s, ensuring rapid production.

Enhanced Motion Stability:

Dual-Y-axis motor eliminates layer misalignment for higher print accuracy.

Anti-Skip Semi-Automatic Belt Tensioning maintains consistent motion precision.

One-Click Resonance Compensation eliminates unwanted vibrations.

Dynamic Flow Compensation ensures consistent extrusion for smooth and detailed prints.

3. Advanced Auto-Leveling and Z-Axis Calibration

LeviQ 3.0 Auto-Leveling automatically calibrates the print bed for optimal adhesion.

Z-Axis Offset Adjustment allows fine-tuning of the first layer.

Precise Layer Alignment enhances overall print consistency and surface finish.

4. Smart Filament Management System

Multi-Filament Intelligent Drying ensures filament remains moisture-free for optimal print quality.

Filament Auto-Refill automatically loads new filament when a spool runs out.

Filament Anti-Entanglement System prevents printing failures caused by filament snags.

5. High-Temperature Hotend for Versatile Material Compatibility

300°C High-Temperature Hotend, supporting a wide range of engineering-grade materials.

Aerospace-Grade Ceramic Composite Throat Tube provides superior heat resistance and prevents clogs.

Quick-Release Hotend Design allows for fast nozzle swaps and maintenance.

Dual-Spring Nozzle Assembly ensures precise filament extrusion.

6. AI-Powered Print Monitoring and Smart Features

AI Spaghetti Detection identifies and pauses failed prints to prevent material waste.

Skip Objects Function automatically removes failed sections from prints, increasing efficiency and reducing cost.

Power-Loss Resume ensures the printer continues from the last position after a power outage.

7. Upgraded Software Ecosystem for Seamless Workflow

Anycubic Slicer Next, based on OrcaSlicer+, provides LAN Mode and Multi-Plate Management for remote slicing and control.

Anycubic App offers real-time monitoring, remote print control, and time-lapse photography.

MakerOnline features a vast library of pre-optimized 3D models, enabling one click slicing and printing.

column3:
The Anycubic Kobra S1 Combo 3D Printer is a state-of-the-art FDM 3D printer engineered for precision, high-speed 3D printing, and seamless multi-color printing. Designed with a fully enclosed CoreXY motion system, it ensures superior stability and efficiency, making it an ideal choice for professional 3D printing, businesses, and serious hobbyists.

Featuring a 250 × 250 × 250mm build size, a printing speed of up to 600mm/s, and an ultra-quiet 44dB operation, the Anycubic 3D printer consistently delivers high-quality prints for functional prototypes, artistic models, and complex designs. Its 320°C high-temperature hotend supports multi-material printing, including PLA, ABS, ASA, PETG, and TPU, allowing users to create durable and visually impressive models effortlessly.

Key Features of Anycubic Kobra S1 Combo 3D Printer

1. Fully Enclosed CoreXY Motion System for Precision Printing

The Anycubic Kobra S1 utilizes CoreXY technology, ensuring motion efficiency and minimal vibrations for precise, high-speed 3D printing.

  • CoreXY motion system for stability and speed.
  • Large build volume of 250 × 250 × 250mm for versatile applications.
  • 600mm/s printing speed for faster production.
  • 20,000mm/s² acceleration for ultra-fast movement.
  • Resonance and dynamic flow compensation for smooth, high-quality prints.

2. Multi-Color Printing with Automatic Filament Management

The Anycubic Kobra S1 Combo supports 4-color and 8-color printing, enabling intricate, multi-tone 3D printing with smooth color transitions.

  • Automatic multi-filament system for seamless color changes.
  • Anti-filament entanglement system to prevent disruptions.
  • Auto-filament refill feature for uninterrupted printing.

3. 320°C High-Temperature Hotend for Expanded Filament Compatibility

With its 320°C high-temperature hotend, the Anycubic Kobra S1 3D printer supports a variety of materials, making it a versatile 3D printer for different applications.

  • Compatible with PLA, ABS, ASA, PETG, TPU, and more.
  • Easy-to-disassemble hotend for effortless maintenance.
  • Anti-clogging nozzle design for consistent extrusion.
  • Aerospace-grade ceramic composite throat tube for enhanced durability.

4. Smart Automation and Intelligent Printing Features

Equipped with advanced automation, the Anycubic Kobra S1 enhances print quality and efficiency with intelligent monitoring.

  • LeviQ 3.0 auto-leveling for precise first-layer calibration.
  • Z-axis offset adjustment for optimized adhesion.
  • Spaghetti detection to identify failed prints.
  • Belt-tension monitoring for stable motion control.
  • Power-loss resume function to continue prints after interruptions.

5. Ultra-Quiet Operation—Ideal for Home & Office Use

Designed for low-noise 3D printing, the Anycubic Kobra S1 operates at just 44dB, making it a quiet 3D printer suitable for any workspace.

  • 44dB ultra-quiet mode for disturbance-free printing.
  • Optimized cooling system for efficient heat dissipation.

6. Integrated Filament Drying for Superior Print Quality

The Anycubic ACE Pro Filament Dryer ensures high-quality 3D prints by keeping filaments dry and free from moisture-related defects.

column3:
The Anycubic ACE Pro is a powerful, intelligent filament management and drying system designed to complement and elevate your multi-color 3D printing experience. Whether you’re printing in 4 colors or up to 8, the ACE Pro works seamlessly with the Anycubic Kobra S1 Combo and other compatible printers to deliver vibrant, high-quality prints while keeping your filaments dry, tangle-free, and print-ready at all times.

Equipped with RFID synchronization, active heating, and smart automation features like filament backup, nozzle clog detection, and auto-refill, the Anycubic ACE Pro transforms your FDM printing setup into a professional-grade, multi-color 3D printing powerhouse.

Key Features of Anycubic ACE Pro

1. Smart Multi-Color Printing (4 to 8 Colors)

The ACE Pro is your gateway to high-quality multi-color printing, supporting 4-color printing by default, and up to 8-color printing with the full expansion kit. Whether you’re creating detailed models, artistic pieces, or product prototypes, this system lets you express every design with vibrant color transitions and seamless layering.

  • Supports 4 to 8-color printing for creative possibilities.
  • Automatically switches filaments based on slicing commands.
  • Ideal for art, branding, education, and professional prototyping.

2. RFID Sync for Intelligent Filament Management

The built-in RFID synchronization technology ensures accurate color matching, filament tracking, and real-time monitoring of filament status. RFID tags allow the ACE Pro to recognize each filament roll, keeping the printing process organized and reducing the risk of errors.

  • RFID-enabled filament recognition for precise color switching.
  • Automatically matches filament spools to your print file.
  • Helps monitor filament usage and remaining volume.

3. Filament Drying While Printing

The ACE Pro features active drying capabilities that work while you print. This ensures that every spool remains dry and free from moisture absorption, which can cause stringing, poor layer adhesion, and failed prints. With continuous 24-hour filament drying, you can print longer, smoother, and more reliably.

  • Active heating system to maintain optimal filament condition.
  • Drying chamber functions while printing to ensure quality.
  • Eliminates common moisture-related defects like bubbling or weak layers.

4. Filament Backup and Auto Refill

No more interrupted prints due to filament depletion. The ACE Pro’s filament backup system and auto-refill function ensure uninterrupted printing by automatically switching to a backup spool when the primary runs out. This intelligent system maintains your workflow, even on long and complex prints.

  • Automatically detects empty spools and activates backup.
  • Supports continuous printing for large, multi-part projects.
  • Saves time and reduces waste.

5. Nozzle Clog Detection and Anti-Tangling

Clogs and tangled spools are two of the most frustrating issues in 3D printing. The ACE Pro actively monitors filament movement and detects when clogging or tangling may occur. When issues are identified, the system pauses printing or switches spools to prevent damage and print failure.

  • Nozzle clog detection for smoother extrusion.
  • Tangle prevention system ensures consistent filament flow.
  • Reduces need for manual intervention.

6. All-Day Filament Drying for Optimal Storage

Even when you’re not printing, the ACE Pro works as a 24-hour drying and storage unit. Filaments stored in the chamber remain dry and ready to use, reducing downtime between prints and improving overall print quality.

  • Keeps filaments in perfect condition between projects.
  • Ideal for humidity-sensitive materials like TPU, PETG, and Nylon.
  • Ensures consistent, reliable extrusion.

A New Level of Multi-Color Creativity

Whether you’re a professional designer, product engineer, or hobbyist artist, the Anycubic ACE Pro takes your 3D printing to the next level. With support for up to 8 distinct colors, your creations gain visual depth and complexity, turning standard prototypes into display-ready models.

  • Perfect for branding, educational models, cosplay props, and product demos.
  • Allows for detailed gradient, pattern, and layer color customization.
  • Enhances the visual appeal of every print.

Seamless Integration with the Anycubic Ecosystem

The ACE Pro is optimized for use with the Anycubic Kobra S1 Combo and other Anycubic multi-color setups. Together, they form a high-speed, intelligent printing system that combines CoreXY motion with advanced filament handling and smart automation features.

  • Designed for plug-and-play integration.
  • Works in harmony with Anycubic slicer software and the Anycubic app.
  • Provides full remote monitoring, time-lapse recording, and error detection.

Why Choose the Anycubic ACE Pro?

✔ Multi-color printing system with support for 4 to 8 filament spools.
✔ RFID Sync for precise filament recognition and color management.
✔ Print while drying—active heating for reliable, high-quality extrusion.
✔ 24-hour drying to maintain filament integrity before, during, and after printing.
✔ Auto filament backup and refill for uninterrupted production.
✔ Nozzle clog detection and anti-tangling mechanism for smooth operation.
✔ Seamless integration with Anycubic Kobra S1 and ACE Pro Slicer.
✔ Easy to use, reliable, and built for professionals and serious enthusiasts.

The Anycubic ACE Pro is more than just a filament dryer—it’s a smart multi-color filament management hub built for the future of 3D printing. By combining RFID-based filament sync, active drying, and intelligent automation, it empowers you to create multi-color, high-precision models with zero hassle. For anyone looking to unlock the full potential of their 3D printer, the ACE Pro is a game-changing addition to your workspace.

Whether you’re printing functional parts, colorful toys, detailed miniatures, or engineering prototypes, the Anycubic ACE Pro ensures every spool stays dry, every transition stays smooth, and every print comes out just the way you imagined.

The Anycubic Wash & Cure 3 Plus is an advanced, all-in-one 3D printer wash and cure station engineered for high-performance resin post-processing. Designed to meet the needs of both hobbyists and professionals, this upgraded unit delivers increased washing volume, superior UV curing accuracy, and enhanced model compatibility. Whether you need a reliable UV curing station for 3D printing or a space-efficient resin 3D printer post-processing solution, the Anycubic Wash & Cure 3 Plus is built to optimize your workflow.

Key Features of the Anycubic Wash & Cure 3 Plus

Size Upgrade for Larger and Multiple Models

The Anycubic Wash & Cure 3 Plus features a 7.6-liter washing capacity—a 13.4% increase compared to its predecessor. With a 12-liter total bucket volume, this unit is compatible with resin 3D printers up to 10.6 inches, allowing users to wash and cure larger prints or multiple models simultaneously.

Dual-Layer Curing Platform for Maximum Efficiency

This model introduces a brand-new dual-layer curing platform, increasing the number of models that can be cured per cycle. By optimizing curing space vertically, it enhances throughput and shortens production time, making it a truly high-capacity wash and cure station.

IPA-Saving Adjustable Cleaning Basket

Reduce alcohol usage while maintaining strong cleaning performance. The Anycubic Wash & Cure 3 Plus includes a dual-layer polypropylene (PP) basket with adjustable heights (150mm and 250mm). This allows for precise cleaning with minimal IPA consumption, compatible with build platforms from 7.6 to 10.6 inches.

Enhanced UV Curing with Gooseneck Light Design

Featuring Flexicure gooseneck UV lights, the curing system reaches an energy intensity of 30,000 µW/cm² within a close range (1–3 cm). This design dramatically improves detail curing on complex areas such as figure skirts and top-facing surfaces, ensuring fine details are preserved and fully cured.

Uniform 360-Degree Curing Performance

The Anycubic Wash & Cure 3 Plus utilizes a newly optimized LED lens array that increases overall curing uniformity by 20%. This results in even exposure and consistent quality across all model surfaces, from base to top.

Quiet, Sealed Operation

A fully enclosed design combined with refined software control reduces operating noise significantly. This makes the unit suitable for home, office, and studio environments where quiet operation is a priority.

Simple, One-Touch Operation

Users can switch between cleaning and curing modes with a single button. Time settings are adjustable from 1 to 30 minutes, allowing full customization based on model size and complexity. The gooseneck UV mode can also be toggled independently for added control.

Why Choose the Anycubic Wash & Cure 3 Plus?

The Anycubic Wash & Cure 3 Plus is a feature-rich, compact, and powerful solution for those seeking professional-grade resin 3D printer post-processing. It excels in both cleaning and UV curing, offering enhanced efficiency, improved safety, and superior results for hobbyists, engineers, and designers alike.

Its increased capacity, IPA-saving features, and powerful UV system make it one of the most advanced 3D printer wash and cure stations on the market today. Whether you’re printing detailed miniatures, prototypes, or production parts, this system ensures your prints are cleaned and cured with precision and care.

Enhance your 3D printing post-processing workflow, the Anycubic Wash & Cure 3 Plus delivers professional performance in a compact, efficient package. It is now available from leading 3D printing suppliers and online stores.

Invest in quality, reliability, and convenience with the Anycubic Wash & Cure 3 Plus—the ultimate resin 3D printer wash and cure station for serious creators.

Efficient Heated Bed

The heated bed consists of four independent (410*410mm) PEI magnetic high-temperature platforms with a maximum temperature of 100°C.

The four platforms can be heated simultaneously to reach 100°C over the entire area in 17 minutes (Ambient temperature: 25℃).

The platform where the model is located can also be automatically recognized and heated independently, or manually and independently controlled for increased energy efficiency.

Fast Printing

Utilizing a 64-bit 1.5G clock speed quad-core high-performance processor (SOC RK3328), it provides sufficient computing capacity while delivering 6 times the printing speed, with a maximum speed of 300mm/s (150mm/s recommended), which is the top end print speed for printers of its size.

Multi Nozzle Printing

Three additional printheads can be added to the X-axis to realize simultaneous printing with four nozzles, supporting printing four of the same model, while each nozzle can be equipped with the same material and different color filament to achieve four different colored models of the same kind.

The maximum power requirement is 1,530 W. For each additional printhead, an extra 100 W is needed. Please ensure that your setup can accommodate this total power load.

Powerful Cooling Fan

Thickened double-sided cooling fans can comprehensively enhance the model printing results. In addition, the fans are equipped with an intelligent control function that stops working when printing is complete, which saves energy and reduces noise as well as prolongs the lifespan. (5015 ball blower fan*2, 4010 ball axial fan*1)

High-Quality Craftsmanship

Integrated body, elegant yet durable. The X-axis and Y-axis are linear guides, effectively improving printing stability and increasing lifespan. The Z-axis features an upgraded version of the Z-Axis rod to make the machine run smoothly and ensure leveling precision. Machine mounts are designed with a carbon steel round base and rubber round anti-slip pad bottom.

Powerful Extrusion System

OrangeStorm Giga features a high-quality brass nozzle capable of reaching 300 °C, ideal for high-temperature materials. The dual-gear direct extruder and titanium heat break ensure consistent filament flow, while the 60 W ceramic heater provides rapid and stable heating.
Equipped with advanced PID auto-calibration and a built-in acceleration sensor, OrangeStorm Giga ensures exceptional print quality by maintaining precise temperature control and reducing vibrations. Create stunning results for all your projects with ease.
Nozzle Diameter (included): 0.6 mm
Nozzle Diameter (optional): 0.4 mm/0.8 mm/1.0 mm

Introducing the ELEGOO MARS 4 DLP Resin 3D Printer, a cutting-edge device that combines advanced technology with exceptional performance.

DLP 3D Technology

This brand-new DLP 3D printer employs Texas Instruments (TI) DLP technology, ensuring precise and uniform projection of the 405nm beam onto the resin tank.

Greater Print Accuracy

With up to 95% light uniformity and tempered glass replacing traditional LCD screens, you can expect reduced light diffusion and stray light interference, resulting in smoother and more delicate model surfaces.

Ultra-long Service Life

One standout feature of the ELEGOO MARS 4 DLP Resin 3D Printer is its impressive lifespan. The DLP projector boasts a remarkable service life of over 20,000 hours, which is ten times longer than LCD screens commonly found in other printers. This longevity saves you valuable maintenance costs associated with screen replacements, allowing you to focus on your creativity without worrying about frequent upkeep.

Better Printing Experience

Not only is the ELEGOO MARS 4 DLP Resin 3D Printer efficient in terms of lifespan, but it is also energy-saving and eco-friendly. Operating at just 12W, it consumes approximately 1/7th of the energy compared to LCD printers. The lower power consumption not only helps reduce your environmental footprint but also eliminates the need for a cooling fan. As a result, the printer operates at an ultra-quiet noise level below 48 dB, ensuring a peaceful and undisturbed printing experience.

Designed for Stability

To enhance stability during the printing process, the ELEGOO MARS 4 DLP Resin 3D Printer features a more robust Z-axis linear rail. By thickening it from 15mm to 20mm, the printer significantly reduces vibration amplitude and minimizes layer patterns on printed models, resulting in superior final print results. The sandblasted surface build plate further improves the printing success rate by providing strong adhesion for reliable model adhesion.

Voxeldance Tango Software

Equipped with the intelligent Voxeldance Tango Slicer, the MARS 4 DLP Resin 3D Printer offers three printing modes: static mode, dynamic mode (including smooth and high-speed mode). In dynamic mode, the slicing software dynamically adjusts the printing speed based on the cross-sectional size of the printed model, optimizing efficiency and minimizing the impact of release forces. Moreover, the ELEGOO MARS 4 DLP Resin 3D Printer supports the open-source GOO slicing format, ensuring compatibility with various slicing software without restrictions.

Maintaining a purified printing environment is essential, and ELEGOO has you covered. The MARS 4 DLP Resin 3D Printer comes with a USB-powered air purifier featuring built-in activated carbon. It effectively absorbs and filters resin odors, creating a refreshing and pleasant printing atmosphere. For even higher air purification capabilities, you can opt for ELEGOO’s first large air purifier specifically designed for the photo curing field. This larger model, measuring 210mm x 247mm x 410mm, can remove up to 95% of volatile organic compounds (VOCs). Please note that the larger air purifier is available for separate purchase.

Technical Details  

  • Model: MARS 4 DLP
  • System: EL3D-3.0.1
  • Slicer Software: ChituBox
  • Technology: MSLA 3D Stereolithography
  • Layer Thickness: 0.01mm - 0.2mm
  • Printing Speed: 30mm/h - 70mm/h
  • Z-Axis Accuracy: 0.00125mm
  • XY Resolution: 0.05mm (2560 x 1440 pixels)

  • Light Source: TI (Texas Instruments) DLP Projector
  • Language Options: Chinese, English, Japanese, Dutch, Korean, French, German, Russian, Italian, Spanish, Turkish, Portuguese
  • Connectivity: USB
  • Weight: 6.8kg
  • Operation: 3.5-inch Touch Screen
  • Power Requirements: 100-240V 50/60Hz, 12V 1.5A 18W
  • Printer Dimensions: 246mm x 230mm x 453mm

The COB+refractive light source technology employed by this printer ensures reduced light dispersion, resulting in uniform and consistent light distribution. This, in turn, produces high-quality prints with a smooth surface and outstanding dimensional accuracy.

Powerful Linux System

Equipped with a powerful Linux operating system and 4Gb RAM, the ELEGOO Saturn 3 Ultra offers a seamless and efficient printing experience. Enjoy stable file transfer and faster computing capabilities, enhancing your productivity and workflow.

Wireless File Transfer

Thanks to its wireless file transfer feature, you can conveniently transfer files via Wi-Fi at speeds of 6-10Mbps. Compatible with both 2.4G and 5G networks, this printer allows flexible file transfers from your computer or mobile device. It even comes with a detachable antenna for improved connectivity.

Release Printing Speed

The ELEGOO Saturn 3 Ultra introduces the ACF release film, a new standard in release printing speed. This specialized film, combined with the upcoming ELEGOO Rapid standard resin, enables printing speeds up to 3 times faster. Experience printing at speeds of up to 150 mm/h, ensuring quicker turnaround times for your projects.

With its all-metal machine body, the Saturn 3 Ultra offers enhanced stability and durability, making it suitable for frequent use. Its sleek and modern design adds a touch of elegance to your workspace, complementing your creative environment.

Ultra-Steady Printing Performance

Benefit from the ultra-steady printing performance of the ELEGOO Saturn 3 Ultra. The integrated ball screw and dual linear guide rail in the Z-axis guarantee precise and steady movement, even at high printing speeds. This reduces layer texture on your final prints, ensuring exceptional quality.

4-Point Leveling System

The 4-point leveling system simplifies the calibration process and optimizes performance. With four clockwise-tightening screws, you can easily align the printer for optimal printing results. The laser-engraved build plate provides excellent adhesion, securely holding models during printing and facilitating easy removal after completion.

4-Inch IPS Touch Screen

Operating the ELEGOO Saturn 3 Ultra is effortless, thanks to the 4-inch HD IPS touch screen with an 800x480px resolution. The new UI interface design offers a user-friendly experience, supporting multilingualism for added convenience.

Voxeldance Tango Slicer

Choose the printing mode that best suits your needs with the Voxeldance Tango Slicer. The Saturn 3 Ultra offers three printing modes and supports the open-sourced GOO slice file format, providing flexibility and customization options.

Excellent Printing Experience

Enjoy an excellent printing experience with effective heat dissipation. The printer is equipped with double heat-conducting copper tubes and a larger cooling fan, ensuring optimal performance and extended service life.

Additionally, the ELEGOO Saturn 3 Ultra features a plug-in air purifier with an activated carbon filter to remove resin odor during printing. It also includes a USB socket reserved for dual USB air purifiers, ensuring a clean and odor-free printing environment.

  • Enhanced Build Platform: The redesigned build platform features laser-engraved patterns for optimal adhesion and easy model removal. This enhancement minimizes the risk of warping and improves the overall success rate of prints.
  • Power-Resumption Function: With a built-in power-resumption feature, the Photon Mono 4 can automatically resume printing from where it left off after a power outage, minimizing material waste and downtime.

Looking for the best 3D printer in India? The Anycubic Photon Mono 4 is perfect for hobbyists, professionals, and enthusiasts alike, offering a combination of precision, speed, and reliability.  is the perfect 2-in-1 solution for post-processing finished printed resin models. The powerful device with a cleaning capacity of 7.6 litres is the perfect addition to LCD 3D printers with a size of 10.6 inches or less.
Larger all around for more capacity
Compared to its predecessor, the Wash & Cure Plus, the successor version, Wash & Cure 3.0 Plus, has a few changes:
The cleaning capacity has been increased to 7.6 litres,
The total volume of the cleaning basket is now 12 litres,
The curing size has been expanded by 42% to 220 x 260 mm to enable post-processing of larger models or multiple small objects in one pass.
Flexicure Gooseneck Light design and new light source arrangement for more even curing
By using the Flexicure Gooseneck light design or the gooseneck light, the energy value is increased by 30,000 uW/cm² within an irradiation range of 1-3 cm. The light balls and lens light source have also been arranged completely differently compared to the previous version, which contributes to more even and thorough curing of otherwise difficult-to-reach areas.

Basket cleaning mode without platform (228 x 128 x 260 mm),

ELEGOO Neptune 4 Pro FDM 3D Printer


Speed Up Printing with Klipper

With the Klipper motherboard and ARM 64-bit 1.5G main frequency quad-core processor to process and execute commands faster, Neptune 4 Pro can print at up to 500mm/s, allowing you to complete your print projects quickly and efficiently. With our pre-installed Klipper firmware, you can start printing right away without the hassle of firmware installation.

In addition, it supports input shaping, which helps eliminate artifacts and resonances on the model surface, and pressure advance, which helps predict nozzle pressure for more accurate and consistent extrusion and less filament ooze and blobbing.

Potent Extrusion & Upgraded Hotend

The printer's dual-gear direct drive extruder is another key feature that ensures smooth and consistent extrusion, weighing only 75% of the weight of the Neptune 3 Pro.

The 5.2:1 reduction ratio and dual-gear design ensure a firm grip on the filament and prevent the flexible filament from slipping and grinding. The copper-titanium bi-metal throat pipe has a unique air duct design for faster heat dissipation of the throat pipe and less nozzle clogging.

The 300°C high-temp nozzle with an extended hotend design to fully melt the filament, and you can explore a wider range of materials, such as PLA, PETG, ABS, TPU, and high-temp filaments like nylon.

Unparalleled Heat Dissipation Performance

In addition to the two thickened 4015 ball bearing cooling fan on both sides of the print head, there are four 4020 ball bearing auxiliary fans behind the print head, which ensures omnidirectional rapid cooling of the newly printed layers even at a fast printing speed, and the deposited hot filament quickly bond together for better overhang and bridge results.

Stable & Quiet Printing

The ELEGOO Neptune 4 Pro 3D printer is designed for quiet and precise printing with its silent drivers for all axes, reducing noise to below 50db. Its wear-resistant POM V-guide wheels moves quietly, smoothly, and accurately.

The Z-axis dual lead screw + Z-axis dual motor design provides better synchronization, increasing the accuracy and stability of the print head movement.

Smoother Model Surface

Support advanced functions like input shaping and pressure advance to achieve smooth model surface and consistent extrusion

Intelligent Segmented Heatbed

With 100W+150W power output, the slicing software automatically recognizes the size of the model during slicing and activates the peripheral heating zone if the model size exceeds the center heating zone (120mmx120mm).

The two partitions can also be turned on and off manually for more precise temperature control.

Additionally, the surface of the PEI magnetic platform is marked for guidance.

column3:
PETG 1.75mm 3D Printer Filament – Description

PETG (Polyethylene Terephthalate Glycol-modified) is a premium thermoplastic filament known for combining the best characteristics of PLA and ABS. It offers exceptional strength, flexibility, and chemical resistance, making it ideal for functional parts, prototypes, and outdoor applications.

Key Features:

  • ✅ High Strength & Durability:
    PETG is tougher than PLA and more flexible than ABS, offering excellent impact resistance and long-term performance.

  • ✅ Easy to Print:
    Offers minimal warping and shrinkage, making it beginner-friendly while still meeting professional demands.

  • ✅ Temperature & Moisture Resistant:
    Performs well under mechanical stress and is highly resistant to water and chemicals, suitable for outdoor use.

  • ✅ Good Layer Adhesion:
    Produces strong, seamless prints with minimal risk of delamination or cracking.

  • ✅ Glossy, Transparent Finish (for natural or clear variants):
    Yields aesthetically pleasing models with a slight shine and smooth surface finish.

  • ✅ Odorless Printing:
    Emits little to no odor during printing, providing a more pleasant user experience.

Specifications:

  • Material: PETG (Polyethylene Terephthalate Glycol)

  • Diameter: 1.75mm (± 0.02mm precision tolerance)

  • Print Temperature: 230°C – 250°C

  • Bed Temperature: 70°C – 90°C

  • Print Speed: 40 – 60 mm/s recommended

  • Recommended Build Surface: PEI, glass bed with glue stick, or tape

  • Density: ~1.27 g/cm³

  • Weight: Typically available in 1kg spools

Applications:

  • Prototyping mechanical parts

  • Electrical housings

  • Medical equipment

  • Outdoor tools and containers

  • Transparent or semi-transparent prints

3D GALAXY Creality Ender 3 is a stable and reliable 3D printing machine for beginners and DIY enthusiasts. It features a smart power supply, a magnetic build surface plate and an MK10 extruder. This printer is designed to reach printing temperature in just 5 minutes. It has an improved Y axis base for better overall stability while printing. It is suitable for printing large and complex models.
 

FDM Printing Machine

This 3D printing machine works on a smart and sophisticated printing method known as Fusion Deposition Modelling (FDM), in which a thermally sensitive filament is heated to its melting point and extruded through a precision extruder layer after layer to create a three-dimensional object. This method is simple yet provides realistic quality output and can be used by beginners and experts.

 

 

Recovered Print Function

This machine is incorporated with recovered printing function that can resume an unfinished operation which may have been interrupted due to power outage or unforeseen incidents. This prevents you from starting all over again and helps save time and filament. It can resume printing from the last recorded extruder position.

 

 

 

 

Stable Mechanical Structure

This powerful printing machine is integrated with a CNC machining Y-Rail mounting groove to precisely position itself. It is also built-in with V-slot and POM-Wheels that render smooth operation with minimal noise. Together, these components allow the printer to remain stable and function with high precision.

 

 

 

 

Functional Print Bed

The print bed of this printing machine has a large build volume of about 220*220*250mm (8.6x8.6x9.8 inches). This allows you to print large and sophisticated models effortlessly, after which you can also detach the print bed to shift the model for cooling and inspection. A magnetic viscous platform sticker is also provided as a mean to reduce warping and replace tapes/glue.

 

 

 

MK 10 Extruder

This functional 3D printer is equipped with an equally functional MK10 extruder that facilitates easy filament loading and unloading. It has a larger hot nozzle for smooth and uninterrupted filament flow. It also features throat adjustment and set screw locking mechanism so that it dispenses accurate amount of filament.

 

 

 

 

Easy to Install

This printing machine is great for beginners as it is delivered in a semi-assembled state. The complete installation process takes about 10 minutes to finish. The process includes 20-screws assembly before you can begin printing. It also teaches first time users about the basics of 3D printer assembly.

The 24V heating tube is usually made of a high-temperature resistant material, such as ceramic or silicone, and is often enclosed in a metal casing to protect it from damage. It is connected to the printer's power supply and controlled by the printer's firmware through a thermistor that measures the temperature of the heated component.

The heating tube is essential for 3D printing because it allows the plastic filament to melt and flow, which is necessary for creating the desired shape of the printed object. Without the heating tube, the plastic filament would not melt and the printer would not be able to create a 3D model.

column3: The Feeder Pneumatic Knob PC4-M6 is a small but important component used in 3D printing. It is responsible for controlling the flow of filament through the feeder mechanism by tightening or loosening the pneumatic fitting. PTFE tubing is preferred for 3D printing because of its low friction properties, which help prevent clogs and jams during the printing process. The tubing is typically sold in lengths of several meters and can be easily cut to the desired size to fit any 3D printer.

column3:
Thermistors with cable for 3D Printer

Thermistors with cable for 3D printers are temperature-sensitive resistors that are used to measure the temperature of the hot end and heated bed in a 3D printer. They are made of semiconductor materials that have a high negative temperature coefficient, meaning their resistance decreases as the temperature increases. The thermistor is usually encased in a small glass or plastic bead and connected to a cable that runs to the printer's control board, which uses the temperature readings to control the heating elements. These thermistors are an essential component of 3D printers, as accurate temperature control is crucial to producing high-quality prints.

Product Description

Creality's Ender 3 Max

  

Creality's Ender 3 Max

Creality's Ender 3 Max is a basic blast from the past. Here are our first impressions.

The main show of the Creality Ender 3 Max is its hefty slab of a build plate, here in Creality’s impressive-sounding carborundum glass. In normal speak, it’s a 300 x 300 mm flat sheet of glass, with a surface texture that grips the print when hot, and releases it when cold.

Standing tall above this print area is a Z-axis of 340 mm, 60 mm less than on the Creality CR-10, the printer the Ender 3 Max is closest.

 

Creality's Ender 3 Max

The print head itself has a curious design, with the push-fit coupling for the Bowden tube recessed below the top of the print head housing. If this remains as is on the finalized Ender 3 Max, users might have a tedious time removing the print head housing before accessing the push-fit for the Bowden tube. Maintenance and blockage-clearing action will be a pain in the posterior.

 

Creality's Ender 3 Max

Creality indicated to us that the Ender 3 Max will ship with a “silent” mainboard. We assumed that the printer would ship with some flavor of TMC stepper motor drivers for quiet operation. This doesn’t seem to be the case, though, with this preview printer whirring and whining away just as the Ender 3 did back in 2018. Cracking the printer open, we find Creality’s new 4.2.2 32-bit board, rocking non-replaceable A4988 stepper motor drivers

 

Creality's Ender 3 Max

Small change aside, we do quite like the Creality Ender 3 Max. It’s shaping up to be a decent simple big-volume printer, though there’s plenty of room for improvement both on Creality’s part pre-launch and for the user customizing their machine

We had initially pondered why the company would bother with a machine that, held against its more recent efforts, is a tad basic. When you use those pricier machines week in week out it gets all too easy to lose sight of how simplicity can be a good thing

column3: A 0.4 mm needle is a thin, pointed metal tool used for cleaning the nozzle of a 3D printer. It is designed to fit into the small opening of the nozzle to remove any residual filament or debris that may have accumulated during printing. This cleaning process is essential to maintain the quality and accuracy of 3D prints and prevent clogs or other issues with the printer. The 0.4 mm size is a common diameter for 3D printer nozzles, making this needle a versatile tool for many types of printers.

column3:
The CR-10 heating block is an essential component of a 3D printer that is responsible for heating the filament to its melting point before extrusion. The heating block is typically made of high-quality aluminum alloy to ensure efficient heat transfer and maintain a stable temperature during the printing process.

The CR-10 heating block typically consists of a hollow cavity designed to hold a heating element, such as a cartridge heater or a thermistor, which is used to monitor the temperature of the block. A nozzle is screwed into the bottom of the block, which is responsible for extruding the melted filament through its small opening.

To ensure efficient printing, the heating block must be capable of reaching and maintaining high temperatures for extended periods. The CR-10 heating block is designed to work with a variety of different filaments, including PLA, ABS, PETG, and TPU, and is often compatible with a range of different nozzle sizes to accommodate different printing requirements.

It's important to note that heating blocks can wear out over time due to high-temperature cycling, so it's important to regularly inspect and replace the heating block to ensure optimal performance and printing quality.

The CR10 Nozzle Extruder Heating Printing Head Kit is an add-on component designed for use with 3D printers, specifically the CR10 model. This kit includes a nozzle, extruder, heating element, and other necessary components for the printing head.

The nozzle is responsible for extruding the melted filament onto the build plate, while the extruder is responsible for feeding the filament into the nozzle. The heating element heats the filament to the appropriate temperature for melting and extrusion.

This kit is an essential component for 3D printing as it ensures that the filament is melted and extruded consistently and accurately. It is also easy to install and replace, making it a popular choice for those looking to upgrade or maintain their 3D printers.

The  Cooling Fan for 3D printer is a small, compact fan designed to help regulate the temperature of 3D printers. It operates on a 24-volt power supply and measures 40mm x 40mm x 10mm in size, making it a good fit for smaller 3D printer models.

The fan is primarily used to cool the printer's hot end and prevent it from overheating during printing. It is also useful for cooling down the printer's printed parts as they are being created, which can help improve the overall quality of the finished product.

The fan's compact size and low noise level make it ideal for use in smaller 3D printing environments, where space may be limited and noise can be a concern. It is typically mounted directly onto the printer's hot end or extruder, and can be controlled through the printer's software or a separate fan controller.

Overall, the 24V 40mm x 10mm Cooling Fan for 3D printer is a crucial component in ensuring the proper functioning and longevity of 3D printers, and is an essential tool for any 3D printing enthusiast or professional.
